Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-28-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to enforce the parties' settlement agreement is granted. Defendant shall perform the obligations it undertook in paragraph 2 of the offer to compromise within 30 days. Failure to comply with the court's order may result in sanctions. Plaintiff shall give notice. Proposed order submitted. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
